query:
SELECT 
  lp.id,
  lp.name,
  lp.level,
  COUNT(lpc.courseId) as course_count,
  GROUP_CONCAT(c.title) as courses
FROM learning_paths lp
LEFT JOIN learning_path_courses lpc ON lp.id = lpc.pathId
LEFT JOIN courses c ON lpc.courseId = c.id
GROUP BY lp.id, lp.name, lp.level
ORDER BY lp.id
